출애굽기 37:1.content: Bezalel made the ark of acacia wood. Its length was two and a half cubits, and its width a cubit and a half, and a cubit and a half its height.

출애굽기 37:2.content: He overlaid it with pure gold inside and outside, and made a molding of gold for it around it.

출애굽기 37:3.content: He cast four rings of gold for it, in its four feet—two rings on its one side, and two rings on its other side.

출애굽기 37:4.content: He made poles of acacia wood, and overlaid them with gold.

출애굽기 37:5.content: He put the poles into the rings on the sides of the ark, to bear the ark.

출애굽기 37:6.content: He made a mercy seat of pure gold. Its length was two and a half cubits, and a cubit and a half its width.

출애굽기 37:7.content: He made two cherubim of gold. He made them of beaten work, at the two ends of the mercy seat:

출애굽기 37:8.content: one cherub at the one end, and one cherub at the other end. He made the cherubim of one piece with the mercy seat at its two ends.

출애굽기 37:9.content: The cherubim spread out their wings above, covering the mercy seat with their wings, with their faces toward one another. The faces of the cherubim were toward the mercy seat.

출애굽기 37:10.content: He made the table of acacia wood. Its length was two cubits, and its width was a cubit, and its height was a cubit and a half.

출애굽기 37:11.content: He overlaid it with pure gold, and made a gold molding around it.

출애굽기 37:12.content: He made a border of a hand’s width around it, and made a golden molding on its border around it.

출애굽기 37:13.content: He cast four rings of gold for it, and put the rings in the four corners that were on its four feet.

출애굽기 37:14.content: The rings were close by the border, the places for the poles to carry the table.

출애굽기 37:15.content: He made the poles of acacia wood, and overlaid them with gold, to carry the table.

출애굽기 37:16.content: He made the vessels which were on the table, its dishes, its spoons, its bowls, and its pitchers with which to pour out, of pure gold.

출애굽기 37:17.content: He made the lamp stand of pure gold. He made the lamp stand of beaten work. Its base, its shaft, its cups, its buds, and its flowers were of one piece with it.

출애굽기 37:18.content: There were six branches going out of its sides: three branches of the lamp stand out of its one side, and three branches of the lamp stand out of its other side:

출애굽기 37:19.content: three cups made like almond blossoms in one branch, a bud and a flower, and three cups made like almond blossoms in the other branch, a bud and a flower; so for the six branches going out of the lamp stand.

출애굽기 37:20.content: In the lamp stand were four cups made like almond blossoms, its buds and its flowers;

출애굽기 37:21.content: and a bud under two branches of one piece with it, and a bud under two branches of one piece with it, and a bud under two branches of one piece with it, for the six branches going out of it.

출애굽기 37:22.content: Their buds and their branches were of one piece with it. The whole thing was one beaten work of pure gold.

출애굽기 37:23.content: He made its seven lamps, and its snuffers, and its snuff dishes, of pure gold.

출애굽기 37:24.content: He made it of a talent of pure gold, with all its vessels.

출애굽기 37:25.content: He made the altar of incense of acacia wood. It was square: its length was a cubit, and its width a cubit. Its height was two cubits. Its horns were of one piece with it.

출애굽기 37:26.content: He overlaid it with pure gold: its top, its sides around it, and its horns. He made a gold molding around it.

출애굽기 37:27.content: He made two golden rings for it under its molding crown, on its two ribs, on its two sides, for places for poles with which to carry it.

출애굽기 37:28.content: He made the poles of acacia wood, and overlaid them with gold.

출애굽기 37:29.content: He made the holy anointing oil and the pure incense of sweet spices, after the art of the perfumer.
